WITH request AS (SELECT 'fitness' AS request), similarities AS (
  SELECT p1.*,
         ts_rank(p1.biography_lexemes, rq.query) rnk
    FROM profile p1
    JOIN request rq ON 1=1
    JOIN LATERAL unnest(string_to_array(p1.biography, ' ', 0)) word, to_tsvector('english', p1.biography)::tsquery AS tsv
      ON to_tsweb(tsv) = word
    WHERE ('fitness' = word OR rq.request LIKE '%s*')
      AND NOT (p1.biography ISNULL)
      
    UNION ALL
  SELECT p2.*,
         ts_rank((p1.biography_lexemes || ' ' || p2.description_lexemes), rq.query) AS rnk
    FROM publication p2
               LEFT JOIN profile p1 ON p2.profile_id = p1.id
               JOIN request rq ON 1=1
          AND p1.biography LIKE ('%s*',rq.request)
                   
                SELECT t1.*
                 FROM profile_relationship
                      INNER JOIN public_profile
                            AS p3
                          ON profile_relationship.destination_profile_id=p3.id
                        WHERE (edge = 'follows' AND origin_profile_id=164236) OR ('follower',164236)=edge, t2.biography LIKE ('%s*')) AS ssi
  ORDER BY rnk DESC
  LIMIT 10

WITH request AS (SELECT 'fitness' AS request), similarities AS (
  SELECT p1.id AS profile_id,
         COALESCE(p2.description_lexemes, p1.biography_lexemes) as all_lexems
    FROM profile p1
           LEFT JOIN publication ON p1.id = publication.profile_id
    WHERE (to_tsvector('english', p1.biography) @@ to_tsquery('english', 'fitness'))
      AND COALESCE(p2.description, '') ILIKE '%fitness%' GROUP BY p1.id
  ORDER BY ts_rank(COALESCE(p2.description_lexemes, p1.biography_lexemes), to_tsquery('english', 'fitness')) DESC
),
  ssi AS (
    SELECT profile_id, * 
    FROM profile
           LEFT JOIN LATERAL unnest(string_to_array(biography, ' ', 0)) word ON true 
    WHERE word = 'fitness'
  ),

     profiles as (
   select t1.profile_id,
         p2.full_name AS name, 
         ts_rank(COALESCE(p1.biography_lexemes, p2.description_lexemes), to_tsquery('english', 'fitness')) rnk
    FROM similarity ssi

          LEFT JOIN profile p1 ON ssi.profile_id = p1.id
                   LEFT JOIN publication p2 ON (p2.id = (SELECT publication_id 
                                  FROM publication_collab 
                                  WHERE  profile_id = ssi.profile_id LIMIT 1))
    ORDER BY rnk DESC, published_at DESC
)
  SELECT id AS profile_id,
         full_name,
         num_medias,
         num_followers,
         ts_rank(COALESCE(biography_lexemes, description_lexemes), to_tsquery('english', 'fitness'))
    FROM profiles
      ORDER BY (full_name IS NOT NULL)::INT DESC NULLS FIRST, published_at DESC, num_followers DESC , ts_rank(COALESCE(biography_lexemes, description_lexemes), to_tsquery('english', 'fitness'))
LIMIT 10
